title: ERRO[0000] failed to move the rootless netns slirp4netns process to the systemd user.slice: Process org.freedesktop.systemd1 exited with status 1
body:
ERRO[0000] failed to move the rootless netns slirp4netns process to the systemd user.slice: Process org.freedesktop.systemd1 exited with status 1



**Is this a BUG REPORT **

/kind bug

**Description**
I use `dockre-compose.yaml`
```
version: '3.1'
services:   
  asterisk:
    image: asterisk
    container_name: asterisk
    restart: always
    ports:
      - 5022:5022/udp
      - 10000-20000:10000-20000/udp
    command: systemctl start asterisk
```
Then I start:  `podman-compose up -d`
and have  error: 
**ERRO[0000] failed to move the rootless netns slirp4netns process to the systemd user.slice: Process org.freedesktop.systemd1 exited with status 1**

if I **commit** range ports        `- 10000-20000:10000-20000/udp `
This problem **disappears!**



**Output of `podman version`: 
```
podman version 4.0.2
```
**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```

**AWS, VMware**

comments.body:
I am not able to reproduce locally.

How have you created the user session?  Through ssh?

Can you reproduce the issue using only podman without `podman-compose`?

Hi, yes I connect through ssh. If I use only podman all work. Some problems with podman-compose v 1.0.3. If I use podman-compose v 0.1.8 (https://pypi.org/project/podman-compose/0.1.8/) all work.  

And also I noticed
I start `podman-compose up -d ` with a range port   '- 10000-20000:10000-20000/udp' in 'docker-compose.yaml' file is not working and  when I press `Ctrl+C` I see:

```
['podman', 'network', 'exists', 'podman_default']
podman run --name=asterisk -d --label io.podman.compose.config-hash=123 --label io.podman.compose.project=podman --label io.podman.compose.version=0.0.1 --label com.docker.compose.project=podman --label com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/podman --label com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yaml --label com.docker.compose.container-number=1 --label com.docker.compose.service=asterisk --net podman_default --network-alias asterisk -p 5022:5022/udp -p 10000-20000:10000-20000/udp --hostname asterisk --restart always name/asterisk systemctl start asterisk

  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/podman_compose.py", line 834, in run

  File "/usr/lib64/python3.6/subprocess.py", line 1477, in wait
    (pid, sts) = self._try_wait(0)
  File "/usr/lib64/python3.6/subprocess.py", line 1424, in _try_wait
    (pid, sts) = os.waitpid(self.pid, wait_flags)
KeyboardInterrupt
